accountSettingsWindow.accountNameRules: Account names cannot contain emoji or other special characters
accountSettingsWindow.changeOncePerSeason: You can only change this once per season.
accountSettingsWindow.changeOncePerSeasonError: You must wait until next season to change this again (${NUM} days)
accountSettingsWindow.googlePlayGamesAccountSwitchText:
If you want to use a different Google account,
use the Google Play Games app to switch.
accountSettingsWindow.linkAccountsInstructionsNewText:
To link two accounts, generate a code on the first
and enter that code on the second.  Data from the
second account will then be shared between both.
(Data from the first account will be lost)

You can link up to ${COUNT} accounts.

IMPORTANT: only link accounts that you own;
If you link with friends’ accounts you will not
be able to play online at the same time.
accountSettingsWindow.resetProgressConfirmNoAchievementsText:
This will reset your co-op progress and
local high-scores (but not your tickets).
This cannot be undone. Are you sure?
accountSettingsWindow.resetProgressConfirmText:
This will reset your co-op progress,
achievements, and local high-scores
(but not your tickets). This cannot
be undone. Are you sure?
accountSettingsWindow.setAccountNameDesc:
Select the name to display for your account.
You can use the name from one of your linked
accounts or create a unique custom name.
accountSettingsWindow.signInInfoText:
Sign in to collect tickets, compete online,
and share progress across devices.
accountSettingsWindow.signInWithAnEmailAddressText: Sign in with an email address
accountSettingsWindow.signInWithDeviceInfoText: (an automatic account only available from this device)
accountSettingsWindow.signInWithV2InfoText: (an account that works on all platforms)
accountSettingsWindow.v2LinkInstructionsText: Use this link to create an account or sign in.

Parrier.descriptionFull: Parry 50 times while still being alive
Parrier.descriptionFullComplete: Parried 50 times while still being alive
Parrier.name: 'What's Sugarcoating?'

When TNT Flies3.description: Fly by holding a TNT with a Star
When TNT Flies3.descriptionComplete: Flied by holding a TNT with a Star
When TNT Flies3.descriptionFull: Fly by holding a TNT with a Star
When TNT Flies3.descriptionFullComplete: Flied by holding a TNT with a Star
When TNT Flies3.name: When TNT Flies

Hard Head.descriptionFull: Get hit by a bomb in the head with a Metal Cap
Hard Head.descriptionFullComplete: Got hit by a bomb in the head with a Metal Cap
Hard Head.name: Hard Headed

Big Fall.descriptionFull: Hit something really hard with your head.
Big Fall.descriptionFullComplete: Hit your head as hard as you could on something. Ouch.
Big Fall.name: Lobotomized

Turbo.descriptionFull: Spam a bunch of buttons until you die.
Turbo.descriptionFullComplete: Spammed a bunch of keys until you died. Whoops.
Turbo.name: RANDOM BULLSHIT GO!!!

MimePunch.descriptionFull: Move back and forth continuously until Mime reaches you then punch it.
MimePunch.descriptionFullComplete: Waited until Mime reached you and punched it. What a spike!
MimePunch.name: That's 15-Love, to Me!

EntityParry.descriptionFullComplete: Successfully parried a entity. Retaliation at it's best.

DozireDeath.descriptionFull: Die to a entity as their look-alike
DozireDeath.descriptionFullComplete: Died to a entity as their look-alike
DozireDeath.name: Who's Who?

Mustachioed.descriptionFull: Stomp a opponent by jumping on their head (UNOBTAINABLE FOR NOW)
Mustachioed.descriptionFullComplete: Stomped a opponent by jumping on their head. Wahoo!
Mustachioed.name: Mustachioed

RorySwooned.descriptionFull: Get SWOON (more than -170% punch) as the Roaring Knight
RorySwooned.descriptionFullComplete: Got SWOON (more than -170% punch) as the Roaring Knight.
RorySwooned.name: SWOONer who's SWOON

Nice Try.descriptionFull: Attempt to use multiple Metal Caps at once.
Nice Try.descriptionFullComplete: Tried to use multiple metal caps. It doesn't work.
Nice Try.name: Metal Cap Collector

Multidance.descriptionFull: Have every player alive do a wiggle dance. (+4 players)
Multidance.descriptionFullComplete: Had every player alive wiggle dance. (+4 players)
Multidance.name: Dance War

kookooAppears:
You feel your attention
sharpening too much... Kookoo haunts you.
Let go of any items when it shows up.
dozerAppears:
Your pride felt way stronger
than it even was... Dozer haunts you.
Stand still, don't move when it shows up.
ireAppears:
Your massive amounts of violence
in the past now worry you... Ire haunts you.
When it attacks, don't stay on ground.
sorrowAppears:
You feel a massive dread
against your own self... Sorrow haunts you.
When it's raining, hold something above you.
mimeAppears:
You feel something urge you
to commit to pleasure... Mime haunts you.
Don't let it touch you. Hit it to send it back.
gambText1:
As soon as you spawn in, 
you start to notice...
gambText2:
Your gambling addiction 
starts getting stronger...
gambText3:
You now automatically roulette
 once in a while!
grabItem:
Press ${GRAB} to get a 
random powerup!
grabSuper:
Press ${GRAB} while midair
 to turn SUPER!
clutchTimer: Waiting for potential respawn before ending...
clutchTimerFail: No one respawned before the period.
endingSoonCoop: The current game will end soon if there are no players. Please join to cancel the timer.
aboutBombSqudaIDS:
BombSquda IDs are special codes that you can link to 
your Discord and use for various things like running 
commands, and some other upcoming features. 
Do not share these IDs (unless you acknowledge 
whatever could happen) because they will later on be 
used to store account-based data. If you delete and 
re-install the modpack, this ID will change. If you wish 
to assign a ID back to your device/build, DM @mellboii 
on Discord (and i'll attempt to do it!)
aboutCustomCurrency:
Spaz Tickets and Tokens are BombSquda's custom currency, 
used to buy things like characters. They will also be 
usable with SpazBot (the discord bot) and will be 
able to be transferred. Even tho they sound like their 
vanilla counterparts (tickets and tokens) and are basically
what inspired them, they are NOT interchangeable 
with vanilla content and will only be used for BombSquda 
related customizables.
surveyPrompt1:
It's your first time here, so let's start.
Choose your space marine's name.
surveyPrompt4: And finally, choose the last one's name.
surveyHelpText: Confirm changes by pressing RETURN or the '${OK}' button.

boomboxWindowText:
Welcome to the Boombox.
This allows you to play any of the game's music
INCLUDING whenever in a online party. 
Select a MusicType and press play to start.
bsRemoteConfigureInAppText: ${REMOTE_APP_NAME} is configured in the app itself.
canWeDebugText:
Would you like ${APP_NAME} to automatically report
bugs, crashes, and basic usage info to the developer?

This data contains no personal information and helps
keep the game running smoothly and bug-free.

chests.slotDescriptionText:
This slot can hold a chest.

Earn chests by playing campaign levels,
placing in tournaments, and completing
achievements.
chests.slotsFullWarningText:
WARNING: All your chest slots are full.
Any chests you earn this game will be lost.

codesExplainText:
Codes are provided by the developer to
diagnose and correct account issues.
completeThisLevelToProceedText:
You must complete
this level to proceed!

configGamepadSelectWindow.androidNoteText: Note: controller support varies by device and Android version.
configGamepadSelectWindow.pressAnyButtonText:
Press any button on the controller
 you want to configure...

configGamepadWindow.analogStickDeadZoneDescriptionText: (turn this up if your character 'drifts' when you release the stick)
configGamepadWindow.appliesToAllText: (applies to all controllers of this type)
configGamepadWindow.autoRecalibrateDescriptionText: (enable this if your character does not move at full speed)
configGamepadWindow.ifNothingHappensTryAnalogText: If nothing happens, try assigning to the analog stick instead.
configGamepadWindow.ifNothingHappensTryDpadText: If nothing happens, try assigning to the d-pad instead.
configGamepadWindow.ignoreCompletelyDescriptionText: (prevent this controller from affecting either the game or menus)
configGamepadWindow.ignoredButtonDescriptionText: (use this to prevent 'home' or 'sync' buttons from affecting the UI)
configGamepadWindow.runTriggerDescriptionText: (analog triggers let you run at variable speeds)
configGamepadWindow.secondHalfText:
Use this to configure the second half
of a 2-controllers-in-1 device that
shows up as a single controller.
configGamepadWindow.startButtonActivatesDefaultDescriptionTe: (turn this off if your start button is more of a 'menu' button)
configGamepadWindow.uiOnlyDescriptionText: (prevent this controller from actually joining a game)

configKeyboardWindow.keyboard2NoteText:
Note: most keyboards can only register a few keypresses at
once, so having a second keyboard player may work better
if there is a separate keyboard attached for them to use.
Note that you'll still need to assign unique keys to the
two players even in that case.

configTouchscreenWindow.swipeInfoText:
swipe controls are a little hard to get used to,
but it makes playing without looking at the controls way easier

configureDeviceInSystemSettingsText: ${DEVICE} can be configured in the System Settings app.

connectMobileDevicesWindow.bestResultsText:
For best results you'll need a lag-free wifi network. You can
reduce wifi lag by turning off other wireless devices, by
playing close to your wifi router, and by connecting the
game host directly to the network via ethernet.
connectMobileDevicesWindow.explanationText:
To use a smart-phone or tablet as a wireless controller,
install the "${REMOTE_APP_NAME}" app on it. Any number of devices
can connect to a ${APP_NAME} game over Wi-Fi, and it's free!
connectMobileDevicesWindow.getItForText:
Get ${REMOTE_APP_NAME} for iOS at the Apple App Store
or for Android at the Google Play Store or Amazon Appstore

coopSelectWindow.activenessAllTimeInfoText: This does not apply to all-time rankings.
coopSelectWindow.activenessInfoText:
This multiplier rises on days when you
play and drops on days when you do not.
coopSelectWindow.challengesInfoText:
Earn prizes for completing mini-games.

Prizes and difficulty levels increase
each time a challenge is completed and
decrease when one expires or is forfeited.
coopSelectWindow.forfeitNotAllowedYetText: This challenge cannot be forfeited yet.
coopSelectWindow.proMultInfoText:
Players with the ${PRO} upgrade
receive a ${PERCENT}% point boost here.
coopSelectWindow.tournamentInfoText:
Compete for high scores with
other players in your league.

Prizes are awarded to the top scoring
players when tournament time expires.
coopSelectWindow.welcome1Text:
Welcome to ${LEAGUE}. You can improve your
league rank by earning star ratings, completing
achievements, and winning trophies in tournaments.
coopSelectWindow.welcome2Text:
You can also earn tickets from many of the same activities.
Tickets can be used to unlock new characters, maps, and
mini-games, to enter tournaments, and more.

debugWindow.reloadBenchmarkBestResultsText: Note: it is recommended that you set Settings->Graphics->Textures to 'High' while testing this.
debugWindow.totalReloadTimeText: Total reload time: ${TIME} (see log for details)

directBrowserToURLText: Please direct a web-browser to the following URL:
disableXInputDescriptionText: Allows more than 4 controllers but may not work as well.
discordFriendsText:
Want to look for new people to play with?
Join our Discord and find new friends!

editGameListWindow.cantSaveAlreadyExistsText: A playlist with that name already exists!

editProfileWindow.accountProfileInfoText:
This special profile has a name
and icon based on your account.

${ICONS}

Create custom profiles to use
different names or custom icons.
editProfileWindow.globalProfileInfoText:
Global player profiles are guaranteed to have unique
names worldwide. They also include custom icons.
editProfileWindow.localProfileInfoText:
Local player profiles have no icons and their names are
not guaranteed to be unique. Upgrade to a global profile
to reserve a unique name and add a custom icon.
editProfileWindow.upgradeProfileInfoText:
This will reserve your player name worldwide
and allow you to assign a custom icon to it.
editProfileWindow.swapoutWarning:
WARNING: Originally, your character was ${CHAR}. It is not in the character list,
so it was swapped for ${CHAR2}. Saving now might overwrite yours.

editSoundtrackWindow.cantDeleteDefaultText: You can't delete the default soundtrack.
editSoundtrackWindow.cantEditDefaultText: Can't edit default soundtrack.  Duplicate it or create a new one.
editSoundtrackWindow.cantSaveAlreadyExistsText: A soundtrack with that name already exists!
editSoundtrackWindow.musicVolumeZeroWarning: Warning: music volume is set to 0

errorDeviceTimeIncorrectText:
Your device's time is incorrect by ${HOURS} hours.
This is likely to cause problems.
Please check your time and time-zone settings.
errorSecureConnectionFailText: Unable to establish secure cloud connection; network functionality may fail.
exitText1: Are you REALLY going to give up!?
exitText3:
Don't leave yet! There's a Spaz Token
right about that corner!
exitText4:
THEN THE WORLD
WAS COVERED
IN DARKNESS.
exitText5:
What would ${SPAZ} think if
he saw you quitting the game?!
fatalErrorText:
Uh oh; something is missing or broken.
Please try reinstalling the app or
contact ${EMAIL} for help.
fireTVRemoteWarningText:
* For a better experience, use
Game Controllers or install the
'${REMOTE_APP_NAME}' app on your
phones and tablets.

gameListWindow.cantDeleteDefaultText: You can't delete the default playlist.
gameListWindow.cantEditDefaultText: Can't edit the default playlist!  Duplicate it or create a new one.
gameListWindow.cantShareDefaultText: You can't share the default playlist.

gatherWindow.aboutDescriptionLocalMultiplayerExtraTex:
Remember: any device in a party can have more
than one player if you have enough controllers.
gatherWindow.aboutDescriptionText:
This is a tab where you
can join people's online servers.
If you wish to host, you can do 
so by either port forwarding, 
using a LAN VPN (Radmin, Hamachi, 
Zerotier), or server forwarders (whatever
 they're called, stuff like playit.gg)
Warning that disconnecting can often happen 
purely due to how many objects can exist or 
how many things are running, and if that does 
happen you can ask the host to enable 
'no particles' (just to help a bit more)
gatherWindow.bluetoothAndroidSupportText: (works with any Android device supporting Bluetooth)
gatherWindow.dedicatedServerInfoText:
dedicated servers are generally better 
if hosting either 24/7 or frequently. 
see bombsquadgame.com/server
gatherWindow.descriptionShortText: (you should get some people on online)
gatherWindow.disconnectClientsText: you're gonna kick everyone. sure about this?
gatherWindow.earnTicketsForRecommendingAmountText:
Friends will receive ${COUNT} tickets if they try the game
(and you will receive ${YOU_COUNT} for each who does)
gatherWindow.earnTicketsForRecommendingText:
Share the game
for free tickets...
gatherWindow.freeCloudServerAvailableMinutesText: Next free cloud server available in ${MINUTES} minutes.
gatherWindow.friendPromoCodeAwardText: You will receive ${COUNT} tickets each time it is used.
gatherWindow.friendPromoCodeExpireText: The code will expire in ${EXPIRE_HOURS} hours and only works for new players.
gatherWindow.friendPromoCodeInstructionsText:
To use it, open ${APP_NAME} and go to "Settings->Advanced->Send Info".
See bombsquadgame.com for download links for all supported platforms.
gatherWindow.friendPromoCodeRedeemLongText: It can be redeemed for ${COUNT} free tickets by up to ${MAX_USES} people.
gatherWindow.friendPromoCodeRedeemShortText: It can be redeemed for ${COUNT} tickets in the game.
gatherWindow.googlePlayDescriptionText: Invite Google Play players to your party:
gatherWindow.googlePlayReInviteText:
There are ${COUNT} Google Play player(s) in your party
who will be disconnected if you start a new invite.
Include them in the new invitation to get them back.
gatherWindow.inDevelopmentWarningText:
Note:

Network play is a new and still-evolving feature.
For now, it is highly recommended that all
players be on the same Wi-Fi network.
gatherWindow.inviteAFriendText:
Friends don't have the game? Invite them to
try it and they'll receive ${COUNT} free tickets.
gatherWindow.manualRouterForwardingText:
you appear to not have port-forwarded.
see the about section for more info
gatherWindow.partyStatusJoinableText: your party is now joinable from the internet
gatherWindow.partyStatusNotJoinableText: your party is not joinable from the internet
gatherWindow.privatePartyCloudDescriptionText: Private parties run on dedicated cloud servers; no router configuration required.
gatherWindow.publicHostRouterConfigText: This may require configuring port-forwarding on your router. For an easier option, host a private party.
gatherWindow.startStopHostingMinutesText: You can start and stop hosting for free for the next ${MINUTES} minutes.
gatherWindow.wifiDirectDescriptionBottomText:
If all devices have a 'Wi-Fi Direct' panel, they should be able to use it to find
and connect to each other.  Once all devices are connected, you can form parties
here using the 'Local Network' tab, just the same as with a regular Wi-Fi network.

For best results, the Wi-Fi Direct host should also be the ${APP_NAME} party host.
gatherWindow.wifiDirectDescriptionTopText:
Wi-Fi Direct can be used to connect Android devices directly without
needing a Wi-Fi network. This works best on Android 4.2 or newer.

To use it, open Wi-Fi settings and look for 'Wi-Fi Direct' in the menu.
gatherWindow.youHaveBeenSentAPromoCodeText: You have been sent a ${APP_NAME} promo code:

getTicketsWindow.inProgressText: A transaction is in progress; please try again in a moment.
getTicketsWindow.unavailableLinkAccountText:
Sorry, purchases are not available on this platform.
As a workaround, you can link this account to an account on
another platform and make purchases there.
getTicketsWindow.unavailableTemporarilyText: This is currently unavailable; please try again later.
getTicketsWindow.versionTooOldText: Sorry, this version of the game is too old; please update to a newer one.
getTicketsWindow.explainText:
These are simple activities you can do to get Spaz Tickets.
These won't gain you a LOT of tickets, but are way easier.
For now, only consists of one game.

clickerWindow.explainText: Click the button 7 times to gain a single ticket.

googlePlayPurchasesNotAvailableText:
Google Play purchases are not available.
You may need to update your store app.
googlePlayServicesNotAvailableText:
Google Play Services is not available.
Some app functionality may be disabled.

helpWindow.canHelpText: well, ${APP_NAME} can surely help with that!
helpWindow.controllersInfoText:
bombsquad supports a MULTITUDE of controllers, 
ranging from your wiimote to 
whatever contraption you have! hell, with the 
BSRemote app you can turn your phone into one!
helpWindow.controllersInfoTextRemoteOnly:
You can play ${APP_NAME} with friends over a network, or you
can all play on the same device by using phones as
controllers via the free '${REMOTE_APP_NAME}' app.
helpWindow.controlsSubtitleText: ${SPAZ} has some moves you'll get familliarized with:
helpWindow.devicesInfoText:
The VR version of ${APP_NAME} can be played over the network with
the regular version, so whip out your extra phones, tablets,
and computers and get your game on.  It can even be useful to
connect a regular version of the game to the VR version just to
allow people outside to watch the action.
helpWindow.friendsGoodText:
always good in any occasion! playing with 
them is good, but best experienced with:
helpWindow.jumpInfoText:
- Jump -
What's a game without 
the abillity to jump?
(and no, don't say any asymslop)
Helps you reach wherever you need, or
get extra speed, or just express joy.
helpWindow.bombInfoText:
- Bomb -
Deals huge damage by... exploding.
Often can result in self-harm,
if you're not careful.
Throw it before the fuse times out.
helpWindow.punchInfoText:
- Punch -
 Beat up whatever is in your way,
whether that be your stupid teammate,
a bomb that fell near you, blunt
force does the trick!
helpWindow.pickUpInfoText:
- Pick Up -
Grab a player, bomb, prop, or
whatever doesn't immediately
disappear or is bolted 
and throw it anywhere.
helpWindow.runInfoText:
- Run -
Holding any button (or key) makes you run.
Can help you get quite far everytime, but turning
gets harder, so watch out for cliffs.
helpWindow.orPunchingSomethingText: maybe you just want a experience that changes bombsquad far off what it's supposed to be?
helpWindow.powerupBombDescriptionText: double it and give it to the next person
helpWindow.powerupCurseDescriptionText:
Death awaits at your door if you grab this.
...lest, you're not afraid of anything...
helpWindow.powerupHealthDescriptionText:
Heals any of your wounds 
or curses you have.
helpWindow.powerupIceBombsDescriptionText:
Turns your enemies into ice. 
This one is shorter, but particularly
makes anyone shatter even by a mosquito bite.
helpWindow.powerupImpactBombsDescriptionText:
Incredibly OP. 
Explodes upon impact with a surface.
helpWindow.powerupLandMinesDescriptionText:
The question is; 
Will you or will you not sugarcoat it?
helpWindow.powerupPunchDescriptionText:
Will slow down your punches, 
but make them quite powerful.
helpWindow.powerupShieldDescriptionText:
Gives you an extra health bar (kinda)
that doesn't affect your normal one.
helpWindow.powerupStrongDescriptionText:
The exact opposite of gloves.
Makes punching faster, but unconveniently weak.
helpWindow.powerupSpongeDescriptionText:
The curse of Spongebob. If you take this,
try to find a random person around
and punch them to pass it on.
helpWindow.powerupRandomDescriptionText:
Are you good at gambling?!
If so, grab this powerup and 
get a random one based on chance!
helpWindow.powerupMetalDescriptionText:
Turns you into a metallic version of yourself
which makes you take half the damage,
and immune to certain effects.
helpWindow.powerupStickyBombsDescriptionText:
A bomb that sticks onto players. 
Hilarity ensues.
(it's just sticky bombs)
helpWindow.powerupShotgunDescriptionText:
A shotgun that takes bombs as ammo!
Lets you fire 3 shots of 
whatever bomb type you have.
helpWindow.powerupHookDescriptionText:
Grants you a hook that can be fired with GRAB,
which will hook onto props and players and pull 
you towards them. Press GRAB again to despawn it.
helpWindow.powerupFireballDescriptionText:
Gives you 8 fireballs that can be fired with BOMB, 
as it bounces and hits anything in its way. 
It also explodes bombs!
helpWindow.powerupBloxyDescriptionText:
A soda that passively heals you 
whenever below 45%, and gives 10% extra HP.
helpWindow.powerupStarDescriptionText:
A super star that makes you 
invincible, faster, and push anything 
that you come into contact with!
helpWindow.powerupDetonDescriptionText:
A switch that explodes all your bombs manually! 
Makes your bombs not explode automatically, 
and you press GRAB to activate it.
helpWindow.curseGraceDescriptionText:
Whether you get them from a Item Box
or whatever, there sure is a bunch of them. Here's a list of them
below because I was too lazy to make a new section.
helpWindow.curseDozerDescriptionText:
Sun-like yellow ball.
When it looks at you, don't move around.
helpWindow.curseIreDescriptionText:
A pure pitch black eye.
When it strikes, make sure to not be on ground.
helpWindow.curseKookooDescriptionText:
Very 'Blue Screen of Death'-ish blue ball.
Memorize the time it shows, and just before
that time strikes, stop holding anything.
helpWindow.curseSorrowDescriptionText:
Nothing but bloody rain, undescribable.
When it shows up, hold anything over your head.
If you hold a spaz above you, it dies instead of you.
helpWindow.powerupsSubtitleText: well, obviously, every modpack needs them!
helpWindow.someDaysText: do you often think bombsquad is a bit too good? not CHAOTIC and STUPID enough??!
helpWindow.toGetTheMostText: to play this game at it's ABSOLUTE best, you need:
helpWindow.mechanicsSubtitleText: cool things that happen or can be done!
helpWindow.mechanicsChargeText:
Whenever you punch a opponent with 
enough speed or force, you'll hear a sound and 
have a number ontop of you. This indicates you 
have a multiplier, and it'll keep increasing 
everytime you punch with enough speed. If you do 
deal a normal punch, you'll deal the same damage albeit multiplied 
the amount of charges that you racked up. 
NOTE: If you hold grab while charged, your punch will not 
count towards the charge increase and instead just release.
helpWindow.mechanicsSuperText:
Randomly, Chaos Emeralds will spawn 
around the map and disappear after a while. 
If you manage to catch all of them, you can 
unlock your SUPER form by pressing 
pickup after jumping! This not only gives 
you some health and a shield, but it 
allows you to do 2 new moves, like flying and;
helpWindow.mechanicsParryText:
Whenever you're able to, you can press the grab
button to attempt a parry. If timed correctly, 
this can prevent you from being hit by ANYTHING!
 Bombs, punches, hitting your head, even falling off the map!
helpWindow.mechanicsHexplodeText:
If you throw a bomb at a person's head and it hits, 
the person who got hit will die instantly having their 
head explode into a bunch of blood/confetti.

ps3ControllersWindow.macInstructionsText:
Switch off the power on the back of your PS3, make sure
Bluetooth is enabled on your Mac, then connect your controller
to your Mac via a USB cable to pair the two. From then on, you
can use the controller's home button to connect it to your Mac
in either wired (USB) or wireless (Bluetooth) mode.

On some Macs you may be prompted for a passcode when pairing.
If this happens, see the following tutorial or google for help.




PS3 controllers connected wirelessly should show up in the device
list in System Preferences->Bluetooth. You may need to remove them
from that list when you want to use them with your PS3 again.

Also make sure to disconnect them from Bluetooth when not in
use or their batteries will continue to drain.

Bluetooth should handle up to 7 connected devices,
though your mileage may vary.
ps3ControllersWindow.ouyaInstructionsText:
To use a PS3 controller with your OUYA, simply connect it with a USB cable
once to pair it.  Doing this may disconnect your other controllers, so
you should then restart your OUYA and unplug the USB cable.

From then on you should be able to use the controller's HOME button to
connect it wirelessly. When you are done playing, hold the HOME button
for 10 seconds to turn the controller off; otherwise it may remain on
and waste batteries.

• Unlocks more game settings
• Also includes:

storeDescriptionText:
8 Player Party Game Madness!

Blow up your friends (or the computer) in a tournament of explosive mini-games such as Capture-the-Flag, Bomber-Hockey, and Epic-Slow-Motion-Death-Match!

Simple controls and extensive controller support make it easy for up to 8 people to get in on the action; you can even use your mobile devices as controllers via the free ‘BombSquad Remote’ app!

Bombs Away!

Check out www.froemling.net/bombsquad for more info.

storeDescriptions.competeInMiniGamesText: Compete in mini-games ranging from racing to flying.
storeDescriptions.customize2Text: Customize characters, mini-games, and even the soundtrack.
storeDescriptions.customizeText: Customize characters and create your own mini-game playlists.
storeDescriptions.sportsMoreFunText: Sports are more fun with explosives.

supportEmailText:
If you are experiencing any problems with the
app, please email ${EMAIL}.
testBuildErrorText: This test build is no longer active; please check for a new version.
menuOverhead1: According to all known laws of aviation, there is no way a bee should be able to fly.
menuOverhead2: Well would you look at that, more useless eye candy! Neat, don'tcha think?
menuOverhead3: Look, I don't have much to say here, I'm just making up reasons to use this feature.
menuOverhead4: Tickets and tokens are now obsolete, with the release of the brand new Spaz Tickets and Spaz Tokens! Get yours NOW!
menuOverhead5: Have you beaten the coop campaign yet? Try getting all those emeralds, too!
menuOverhead6: New characters are still on the way and upcoming!
menuOverhead7: Also check out SpazBot, the discord bot for BombSquda, at ${SERVER}/bot
menuOverhead8: A lot of online features are coming soon if i stop procrastinating, but they will likely mostly be optional stuff.
menuOverhead9: Try playing around with the settings, play the game the way you want to!
menuOverhead10: Check your inventory, you might find some goodies.
menuOverhead11: Just checking in for now- ...what? What do you mean the characters are souls trapped in the game?? No they arent??? What are you talking about?!??!??!?!!!
menuOverhead12: Fun fact; someone once told me they were gonna report me for selling drugs. I **SWEAR** I wasn't doing that!
menuOverhead13: Who's talking on the intercom right now? Well, that's for you to find out. In due time, maybe?
menuOverhead14: You's gonna have to pay me after destroying all those SpazBots, I paid GOOD money for them!

ticketsDescriptionText:
Tickets can be used to unlock characters,
maps, minigames, and more in the store.

Tickets can be found in chests won through
campaigns, tournaments, and achievements.

need to wait.
tokens.tokensDescriptionText:
Tokens are used to speed up chest unlocks
and for other game and account features.

You can win tokens in the game or buy them
in packs. Or buy a Gold Pass for infinite
tokens and never hear about them again.
tokens.youHaveGoldPassText:
You have a Gold Pass.
All token purchases are free.
Enjoy!

tips.theFinaleTip1:
you're in your super form now!
get all your muscle memory from dodging bots
out the window, as now you can PARRY! go get em!!!!!
tips.theFinaleTip2:
if you kill a bot that has charges, you steal their charge!
this also applies to players, so make sure to release one you have whenever you can!
tips.theFinaleTip3: remember that you need 2000 score to win
tips.theFinaleTip4: go ahead! bring your friends! make it HARDER!!!
tips.tipText1:
getting 'mean-charges' by punching is guaranteed if you wiggle around or spin in place!
remember that you can get multiple of them by going faster!
tips.tipText2:
the whiplash might seem hard to maneuver, but if you hook onto a enemy,
wait a bit, jump and spin, then punch when close, you might do MASSIVE damage!
tips.tipText3:
if you got hooked onto, you can punch or blow 
up the hook with enough damage and it'll break off!
tips.tipText4:
if you see someone flashing rainbow and with different music,
 your best bet is NOT fighting and instead just running off.
tips.tipText5:
a super form might seem very op, but remember it's 
not invincible! catch a person off-guard and you can deal damage!
tips.tipText6:
the metal cap might seem somewhat useless at first due to making you slow,
but it reduces damage taken and also has invulnerability against effects like ice!
tips.tipText7:
a fireball might not deal enough damage,
but it can actually knock your enemies away!

tips.runaroundTip1:
you cant jump onto the ledges,
you HAVE TO THROW BOMBS!!!!!!!!!!!!
tips.runaroundTip2:
try spinning and jumping before
throwing your bomb for more strength!
tips.runaroundTip3:
set up mines around points bots
will walk in so they get taken care of...

tutorial.cpuBenchmarkText: Running tutorial at ludicrous-speed (primarily tests CPU speed)
tutorial.phrase01Text: hi im the guy of the tutorial lol
tutorial.phrase02Text: welcome to bombsquda, the modpack where YOU will die!
tutorial.phrase03Text: you're gonna learn how to play with me!!
tutorial.phrase04Text: oh, also remember your gameplay is VERY based on physics.
tutorial.phrase05Text: like when we attack this guy...
tutorial.phrase06Text: our damage output is based on our momentum.
tutorial.phrase07Text: since we weren't moving, ${NAME} over here didn't take any damage.
tutorial.phrase08Text: so now we spin and jump to get momentum...
tutorial.phrase10Text: running (which of course gives speed) can get you momentum.
tutorial.phrase11Text: jus hold any button to run. simple.
tutorial.phrase12Text: combining running, jumping and spinning makes you do max damage.
tutorial.phrase13Text: see? well, don't mind that guy he'll be fine
tutorial.phrase14Text: you can grab pretty much any physics prop, including lil ${NAME} over here.
tutorial.phrase16Text: it's time to bring out your aiming skills!
tutorial.phrase17Text: ow- god DAMMIT who messed with the fuse.
tutorial.phrase18Text: by moving, you'll throw it farther
tutorial.phrase21Text: oh and also, you need to time your bombs...
tutorial.phrase22Text: well we hit him, but not too much damage.
tutorial.phrase23Text: let's try holding it a bit..
tutorial.skipConfirmText: you SURE you wanna skip this??
tutorial.toSkipPressAnythingText: press any action button to skip

voteInProgressText: A vote is already in progress.

watchWindow.replayRenameErrorAlreadyExistsText: A replay with that name already exists.

finaleOverhead: We've now gotten info that ${NAME} is apparently on the loose and REALLY mad. They're flashing yellow and glowing... seems like they got some sort of power.
finaleOverhead2: They're still on their onslaught against the multitude of SpazBots, mowing through them like it's basically nothing!
finaleOverhead3: You can't really tell if they're mad or not; those big eyes don't really help. Other than that, they seem to be really enjoying this..
workspaceSyncErrorText: Error syncing ${WORKSPACE}. See log for details.
workspaceSyncReuseText: Can't sync ${WORKSPACE}. Reusing previous synced version.
